name: Guardrails AI
oneliner: Open-source framework for adding safety guardrails and validation to LLM outputs, applicable to financial services
finserv: Bloomberg Beta investor signals finserv relevance; general-purpose guardrails framework; open-source traction
team: Backed by Bloomberg Beta and GitHub; open-source community
thesis: Guardrails AI addresses non-negotiable requirement for deploying AI agents in financial services: ensuring outputs are safe, validated, and hallucination-free. As You enables third-party agents, this becomes essential.
